description: A threat intelligence analyst receives a feed with new Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) for an active malware campaign.

nodes.task_description: Ingest the threat intelligence feed and parse the new IOCs (e.g., malicious file hashes, C2 domains).

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully extracts all new IOCs from the feed.

nodes.task_description: Add the new malicious domains and IPs to a blocklist on the network firewall and web proxy.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst proactively blocks the known-bad infrastructure.

nodes.task_description: Create a new detection rule in the EDR system to alert if any of the malicious file hashes are seen on any endpoint.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst creates a new detection capability based on the threat intelligence.
